title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
